title: rubus menkei
intro: Rubus menkei, also known as the Menke's blackberry or Menke's raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Rubus menkei can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine.
